name: Layout Text Flip
summary: A text component cycling through words with blur transitions and layout animations using Framer Motion.
detailedDescription: Layout Text Flip displays a static text label alongside cycling words that animate with blur and y-axis transitions. The component uses AnimatePresence with mode:'popLayout' for smooth word swaps. Words cycle at configurable interval (default 3000ms) using setInterval. Each word animates from y:-40 with blur(10px) to y:0 with blur(0px) over 0.5s duration. Exit animation moves to y:50 with blur(10px) and opacity 0. The cycling word container has rounded-md border, white/dark background, shadow, and ring styling. Text size is 2xl (4xl on md+) with bold weight and tracking-tight. Drop-shadow enhances readability. This creates engaging headline component where secondary text rotates through options (e.g., 'Build Amazing' + ['Landing Pages', 'Components', 'Sections']). Ideal for hero headlines, value proposition rotators, or any context where cycling keywords add dynamism without overwhelming layout.
purpose: Display static text with cycling dynamic words
Animate word transitions with blur and slide
behavior: Cycles through words array at interval
Applies popLayout mode for layout shifts
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
